language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language of the app

description.manual: Prompts before file reads and writes; read-only commands run automatically.
description.sandbox: Commands run in the macOS sandbox; file operations still prompt.
description.off: No prompts, no sandbox — everything runs.

showThinking.title: Show thinking process
showThinking.description: Display the model's reasoning in the conversation

update.title: Check for updates
update.description: Check the official source and download the latest installer
update.noAsset: No installer for this platform yet — please download from the website

models.noModels: No models loaded from the Agent. Make sure it's running and signed in.

providers.keyDialogDescription: The key is saved to the Agent's shared auth.json.
providers.keySaved: Saved the {{provider}} key. Takes effect in new sessions.
providers.connected: Connected to FutureOS. Takes effect in new sessions; if it doesn't, run future agent restart.
providers.baseUrlDialogDescription: This provider's Base URL is a placeholder — replace it with your own (e.g. your Azure resource name).
providers.apiKeyKeepPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep the current key

customProvider.description: The provider is written to ~/.future/agent/models.json; the Agent may need a restart to load the new models.
customProvider.apiKeyLabelEditing: API key (leave blank to keep current)

errors.idLength: Provider ID must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters.
errors.idPattern: Provider ID may only contain lowercase letters, digits, '-' and '_'.
errors.idExists: That provider ID already exists, please choose another.
errors.baseUrlInvalid: Base URL must be a valid http/https address.
errors.namePattern: Provider name may only contain letters, digits, spaces and _.()-; Chinese / emoji / full-width characters are not supported.
errors.nameExists: That provider name already exists, please choose another.
errors.modelsMax: The number of models cannot exceed {{max}}.

futureLogin.title: Connect FutureOS
futureLogin.description: The authorization page should have opened in your browser. If it didn't, copy the link below to open it manually.
futureLogin.waiting: After confirming the code and authorizing in your browser, the connection will complete automatically here…
futureLogin.expired: The authorization code has expired, please try again.

reset.switchEnvironmentDescription: Switch the sign-in and API endpoints between production and test. Switching clears the current sign-in and restarts the app automatically; you'll need to sign in again in the new environment.
reset.clearDataDescription: Clear the GUI local database and temporary workspace (chats, background programs, review records, etc.); the app restarts automatically when done. Sign-in and provider settings are unaffected. This action cannot be undone.
reset.confirmClear: Clear all local data and restart?
